STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_EVENT_ODD_MERCHANT_EVE:
After leaving the shop, you wander through winding paths and somehow stumble upon another store you've never seen before. The merchant behind the counter wears a tailcoat and top hat, smiling with impeccable courtesy.

"Ah, just came out of a shop, did you? Short on money already? I might be able to help."
Lose all your gold. Obtain a [purple]Loan[/purple] curse.

The merchant deftly files away two of your cards, then pushes a bag of gold toward you.

"A fair trade, as always."

The merchant sweeps every coin from your pouch and hands you a contract.

"Sign it. Debt is still better than having no way forward."
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_EVENT_IRON_AND_BEAST_E: Inside the Spire, you discover two phantasmal shadows. One is as massive as a giant beast, the other matches your own shape. You can express your intent before they fade away.
Remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]deck[/gold], lose [red]8[/red] max HP, and shuffle [purple]Moonlit Gaze[/purple] into your [gold]deck[/gold].
Lose all your [gold]gold[/gold] and shuffle [purple]Nonexistence[/purple] into your [gold]deck[/gold].
Shuffle [purple]Normality[/purple] into your [gold]deck[/gold]. Gain [blue]3[/blue] random relics.
Other players have not selected this option yet.
Your mockery turns into a price paid, and in return you claim one more burden and three treasures.
[purple][sine]The shadows let out a silent scoff[/sine][/purple], [sine]then faded away together.[/sine]
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_EVENT_ROSE_AND_SCARECR:
You wander into a corner and notice a few little roses on the ground.
Following the vines upward, you find a [red][jitter]massive blood-red rose[/jitter][/red] rooted in the ceiling, wrapped around a [green]rag doll[/green].

[purple][sine]"...Have you... seen it?"[/sine][/purple]
[blue][sine]The rose's voice echoes through your soul as sharp vines curl around your fingers.[/sine][/blue]
Obtain [gold]Cifka Doll[/gold]. Lose [red]13[/red] HP. Randomly increase the cost of [blue]2[/blue] non-starter cards by [blue]1[/blue].
Lose [gold]Cifka Doll[/gold]. Gain [blue]300[/blue] [gold]gold[/gold]. Randomly decrease the cost of [blue]2[/blue] non-starter cards by [blue]1[/blue].

You [red][jitter]rip[/jitter][/red] the doll free. The vines tighten instantly, and blood runs through your fingers.
[blue][sine]The rose lets out a low laugh.[/sine][/blue]

You hand over the [blue]rag doll[/blue].
The rose grows still, the vines retreat from your fingers, and a heavy [gold]pouch[/gold] drops before you.
You brush aside the vines and walk away. A shallow cut opens on your fingertip, [red][sine]and tiny flowers bloom where the blood falls.[/sine][/red]

[purple][sine]The rose falls silent for a moment[/sine][/purple], then withdraws its vines into shadow.
[blue][sine]You leave with nothing.[/sine][/blue]
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_EVENT_STRANGE_MYSTERIO:
On your path forward, you notice a [sine]door that does not belong[/sine]. Curiosity pushes you to open it: a chaotic [purple]laboratory[/purple], and a [red]mysterious man[/red] seated at its center.

[blue][sine]"I am here to record. The whole Spire has already been archived. I can offer you help, but you'll have to pay a price."[/sine][/blue]

On your path forward, you notice a [sine]door that does not belong[/sine]. Curiosity pushes you to open it: a chaotic [purple]laboratory[/purple], and a [red]mysterious man[/red] seated at its center.

[blue][sine]"I am here to record. The whole Spire has already been archived. I can offer you help, but you'll have to pay a price."[/sine][/blue]

You see that [sine]familiar door[/sine] again and open it without hesitation. The [red]mysterious man[/red] is still seated in the [blue]laboratory[/blue].

[purple][sine]"Hey, we meet again. So, your choice this time is..."[/sine][/purple]

Lose [red]10[/red] Max HP. Obtain a random relic.
Lose [red]15[/red] HP. Obtain and upgrade a random Rare card.
Lose [red]20[/red] Max HP. Obtain [blue]3[/blue] random Ancient cards.
Upgrade [blue]2[/blue] random cards, then lose [red]8[/red] HP.
Obtain [blue]2[/blue] random relics and add [blue]2[/blue] random curses to your [gold]deck[/gold].

You made your choice. Though it [red][jitter]hurts[/jitter][/red], for a Rare card,
[gold][sine]it is worth it...[/sine][/gold]

You made your choice. [red][jitter]Pain needles your nerves[/jitter][/red], but for a relic,
[gold][sine]it is worth it...[/sine][/gold]

You made your choice. You [red][jitter]spent every coin[/jitter][/red],
[blue][sine]yet your body feels lighter...[/sine][/blue]

STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_EVENT_CURSED_CELL_EVEN: In the [purple]sewers[/purple], you meet [green]a man who calls himself king[/green], holding [gold]a sword[/gold]. You decide:
You grip that [red][sine]cold blade[/sine][/red], [purple][sine]and the curse burrows into your flesh like a living thing.[/sine][/purple]
You memorize those [purple][jitter]twisted formulas[/jitter][/purple], [orange][sine]and your wounds begin to stitch themselves through pain.[/sine][/orange]
